message:
feat(mux): add 50MB file size limit to prevent OOM crashes

Very large files (>50MB) are now skipped during download to prevent memory
exhaustion. Previously, files of any size were loaded entirely into memory:
- 100 MB file = 100 MB allocated
- 32 concurrent goroutines on 100 MB files = 3.2 GB memory
- Plus compression buffers = OOM crash

The 248 MB .zig-cache files were causing the server to be killed.

Changes:
- transfer.zig: Add max_file_size constant (50 MB)
- main.zig: Check file size in readFileForGoroutine()
- Skipped files logged with clear message showing size and limit

Future enhancement: Implement streaming for very large files instead of skipping.
